internal_unresolveds.reason: Franchised vs Owned/Managed RevPAR gap ($114.58 vs $154.18, 25.7% difference) is unexplained in the FDD. Prospective franchisees should investigate whether this reflects structural disadvantage or loc
AOP Term is negotiated per deal (1-5 years). The exact term is not disclosed and cannot be assessed until negotiation.
$110M goodwill impairment in management and franchising reporting unit signals declining valuation. Whether this specifically reflects the franchise segment is unclear.
